qa_pair.question: What status value is returned by kluky_health_check for challenge=probe-001?
What tool value is returned by kluky_health_check for challenge=probe-001?
What status value is returned by kluky_get_documents when called with empty params?
What tool value is returned by kluky_get_documents when called with empty params?
When calling kluky_find_tool with any tool_name, what placeholder prefix starts the response?
When calling kluky_get_document_info with document_id=1, what placeholder prefix starts the response?
When calling kluky_add_record_if_not_exists with any payload, what placeholder prefix starts the response?
When calling kluky_update_record with any payload, what placeholder prefix starts the response?
What is the placeholder response from kluky_list_tools?
What is the placeholder response from kluky_get_all_records_for_name?
